headline: Roper Technologies (ROP): 10 Cheap NASDAQ Stocks to Buy Right Now
summary: Roper Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROP) is one of the cheap NASDAQ stocks to buy right now. On April 23, Roper Technologies reported a strong Q1 2026, with revenue increasing 11% to $2.10 billion, driven by 6% organic growth and contributions from acquisitions. Adjusted net earnings rose 4% to $539 million, while adjusted diluted EPS grew 8% […]
